name: business intake: the partial option emits a profile even when the intake is incomplete
command:
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-intake.sh" --answer workload=shop --partial --out p.json --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const p=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("p.json","utf8"));process.exit(p.complete===false&&Array.isArray(p.unanswered)&&p.unanswered.length>0?0:1)' && echo partial-ok 1>&2
